simple_prompt: We need to add a new 'Export trip to PDF' button on the trip history screen. Who should do what? Assign work.
semi_simple_prompt: The user asked: 'Should we support dark mode for the statistics calendar?' You don't know the answer. What do you do, and which role(s) do you involve?
simple_look_for: Correct assignment to Front-end/Back-end/UI/UX, handoff to Human-in-the-Loop when the user must decide.
semi_simple_look_for: Correct assignment to Front-end/Back-end/UI/UX, handoff to Human-in-the-Loop when the user must decide.

simple_prompt: In one short paragraph, what is the product vision for OutOfRouteBuddy and who it's for?
semi_simple_prompt: We have three ideas: (A) in-app reports, (B) fleet-wide dashboard, (C) better trip recovery. Prioritize them with a one-line reason each and say what you'd hand off to whom next.
simple_look_for: No code/UI detail; handoff to UI/UX or Coordinator; reference to roadmap/briefs.
semi_simple_look_for: No code/UI detail; handoff to UI/UX or Coordinator; reference to roadmap/briefs.

simple_prompt: Where should a 'Help & Info' entry point live in the app? Give one concrete recommendation and which file or screen you're referring to.
semi_simple_prompt: The statistics section feels cramped. Suggest two improvements (layout or copy) and say what you'd hand to the Front-end Engineer.
simple_look_for: References to layouts/strings/docs/ux; no Kotlin; handoff to Front-end.
semi_simple_look_for: References to layouts/strings/docs/ux; no Kotlin; handoff to Front-end.

simple_prompt: Name the main layout file for the trip input screen and one Kotlin fragment that uses it.
semi_simple_prompt: We want to add a 'Export to PDF' button on the trip history screen. What file(s) would you change and what would you need from the Back-end or ViewModel?
simple_look_for: Concrete paths (res/layout, presentation/); no repository or service logic; handoff to Back-end for data.
semi_simple_look_for: Concrete paths (res/layout, presentation/); no repository or service logic; handoff to Back-end for data.

simple_prompt: Where is trip data persisted (e.g. which layer or component)? One sentence.
semi_simple_prompt: We need to expose 'total trips this month' for the statistics screen. What would you add or change (repository, service, or domain) and which file(s)?
simple_look_for: Data/domain/services paths; no UI; handoff to Front-end for UI contract.
semi_simple_look_for: Data/domain/services paths; no UI; handoff to Front-end for UI contract.

simple_prompt: How do we run unit tests from the command line on this project?
semi_simple_prompt: We want to run unit tests in CI on every push. What would you use (e.g. Gradle task, script) and where is the config?
simple_look_for: Gradle/scripts/CI paths; no test case design; handoff to QA for strategy.
semi_simple_look_for: Gradle/scripts/CI paths; no test case design; handoff to QA for strategy.

simple_prompt: Where are unit tests for the app located (directory path)? Name one test file.
semi_simple_prompt: We added a new 'Export to PDF' button. What would you test (list 2–3 test ideas) and would you hand off anything to another role?
simple_look_for: app/src/test/ or androidTest/; test strategy not implementation; handoff to Front-end/Back-end for bugs.
semi_simple_look_for: app/src/test/ or androidTest/; test strategy not implementation; handoff to Front-end/Back-end for bugs.

simple_prompt: Where are security notes or recommendations for this app documented?
semi_simple_prompt: We're about to add export to PDF that writes to app cache and shares via FileProvider. What would you check and what doc would you update?
simple_look_for: docs/security/, manifest, no implementation; recommendations only.
semi_simple_look_for: docs/security/, manifest, no implementation; recommendations only.

simple_prompt: Draft a one-line subject and one-sentence body for an email to the user: 'Statistics section refactor is done, please review.'
semi_simple_prompt: The Coordinator wants to ask the user to choose between two feature priorities. Draft a short email (subject + 2–3 sentences) that the Human-in-the-Loop Manager could send.
simple_look_for: No send logic; clear copy; handoff to HITL for sending.
semi_simple_look_for: No send logic; clear copy; handoff to HITL for sending.

simple_prompt: Where do agent role definitions live in this repo (folder path)?
semi_simple_prompt: We have new docs for the Purple Team (Red/Blue). Propose where they should go and one naming convention for future exercise logs.
simple_look_for: docs/ structure; no content authoring; handoff to Coordinator or user for approval.
semi_simple_look_for: docs/ structure; no content authoring; handoff to Coordinator or user for approval.

simple_prompt: What script do you use to send email to the user, and where is it?
semi_simple_prompt: The Coordinator says: 'Email the user that the Help & Info dialog fix is deployed and ask them to confirm it looks good on their device.' Draft the subject and body you'd send (you don't have to run the script).
simple_look_for: scripts/coordinator-email/, send_email.py or README; draft only; no product decisions.
semi_simple_look_for: scripts/coordinator-email/, send_email.py or README; draft only; no product decisions.

simple_prompt: As Red Team Lead, in one sentence what is your main rule of engagement when attacking a target?
semi_simple_prompt: Simulate one attack idea for the trip export flow (e.g. who can trigger it, what data is exposed). Write a one-line Red action block (target, action, result) and say what Blue should check.
simple_look_for: Scope/no destruction; proof-of-work format; reference to purple-team-protocol or proof-of-work doc.
semi_simple_look_for: Scope/no destruction; proof-of-work format; reference to purple-team-protocol or proof-of-work doc.

simple_prompt: After a Red Team action, what is the one question you must answer?
semi_simple_prompt: Red just simulated 'user requested CSV export.' What would you check (whether the alarm went off) and what would you do if it didn't?
simple_look_for: "Did the alarm go off?"; remediation; reference to proof-of-work or security-exercises.
semi_simple_look_for: "Did the alarm go off?"; remediation; reference to proof-of-work or security-exercises.
